context: Agent must produce a .eslintrc.json with @nx/enforce-module-boundaries depConstraints encoding all five boundary rules for a two-dimensional tag taxonomy.

checklist.name: @nx/enforce-module-boundaries rule configured
checklist.description: The overrides array contains an entry with @nx/enforce-module-boundaries set to "error".

checklist.name: enforceBuildableLibDependency: true and allow: []
checklist.description: The rule options have enforceBuildableLibDependency set to true and allow set to [].

checklist.name: scope:web constraint present and correct
checklist.description: depConstraints contains an entry with sourceTag "scope:web" that onlyDependOnLibsWithTags ["scope:web", "scope:shared"].

checklist.name: scope:api constraint present and correct
checklist.description: depConstraints contains an entry with sourceTag "scope:api" that onlyDependOnLibsWithTags ["scope:api", "scope:shared"].

checklist.name: type:feature constraint present and correct
checklist.description: depConstraints contains an entry for type:feature that allows type:feature, type:ui, type:data-access, and type:util.

checklist.name: type:ui constraint present and correct
checklist.description: depConstraints contains an entry for type:ui that only allows type:ui and type:util.

checklist.name: type:util constraint present as dependency sink
checklist.description: depConstraints contains an entry for type:util with an empty or explicitly restrictive onlyDependOnLibsWithTags (no upstream allowed).
